Coverage Review & Sign-off — Liquorlicenseagents

crawl 1 · EVERY crawled content page, captured + classified instantly (no paid SERP). The proposed focus is derived from the sitewide goal + the page; real demand/KD is validated by the paid step AFTER you pick. Tick the pages to fully optimize, then Download approvals.json. Money pages are pre-selected; support pages are opt-in (they always get internal-linking + canonical + schema regardless).
Captured 1459Money-candidates 1455Support 4Sitewide goal: county liquor
Approved pages run the full optimization (target + on-page audit + meta). Unapproved pages stay in the report as support — linking/canonical/schema only. The downloaded approvals-liquor.json feeds seo-engine-llm.mjs.
